title: Add Menu Bar with View Options
instructions: Add a menu bar at the top of the file manager window with File, View, and Help menus. Include options for showing/hiding hidden files, refresh, and other useful features.

1783574379.203344.instruction: Create the left panel with a ttk.Treeview widget for displaying the directory tree structure. Add a scrollbar, configure columns, and set up the basic tree frame with proper grid layout. The tree should have a single 'name' column showing folder names.

1783574379.2035208.instruction: Populate the tree view with initial root directories (/, /home on Linux/Mac or C:\ on Windows). Insert root nodes with proper identifiers and folder icons. Use platform detection to determine appropriate starting points.

1783574379.2043667.instruction: Implement lazy loading so directories are only scanned when expanded. Add dummy child nodes for folders that have subdirectories, replace them with actual content on expansion. Handle the tree expand event to load children dynamically.

1783574379.2044702.instruction: Create the center/right panel with a ttk.Treeview showing file details in columns: name, size, modified date, and type. Add scrollbars (vertical and horizontal) and configure column widths. Sort files with folders first.

1783574379.204562.instruction: Link the tree view selection event to update the file listing. When a directory is selected in the tree, scan its contents using os.scandir() and display files/folders in the center panel. Handle the selection change event.

1783574379.2046585.instruction: Add double-click navigation in file view to enter folders. Implement path tracking and add a path bar showing current directory. Add parent directory navigation (..) option. Synchronize tree selection with file view navigation.

1783574379.204757.instruction: Add visual distinction between files and folders using emoji icons (📁 for folders, 📄 for files). Configure tree and file view to show appropriate icons. Update config.py with icon constants if needed.

1783574379.2048652.instruction: Add proper error handling for permission denied errors, inaccessible directories, and file system errors. Show user-friendly error messages in status bar or dialogs. Wrap file system operations in try-except blocks.

1783574379.2049706.instruction: Add a refresh button to reload current directory contents. Implement a status bar at the bottom showing current path, item count, and error messages. Update status bar on directory changes and operations.

1783575112.7835135.instruction: Create the menu bar at the top of the window with three menus: File, View, and Help. Set up the menu structure using tk.Menu. Add menu bar to the main window before the main frame.

1783575112.7837615.instruction: Add File menu with options: Refresh (Ctrl+R), Separator, Exit (Ctrl+Q). Connect Refresh to _refresh_file_view method. Connect Exit to root.destroy.

1783575112.8220062.instruction: Add View menu with "Show Hidden Files" checkbox option (boolean variable). Store setting in config or instance variable. Update _refresh_file_view to filter hidden files (starting with .) based on this setting. Refresh view when toggled.

1783575112.8222003.instruction: Add "Show Status Bar" checkbox option in View menu. Connect to show/hide the status bar frame. Update _create_status_bar to store reference and toggle visibility.

1783575112.8223696.instruction: Create Help menu with About option. Show messagebox with app info (name, version, description) when clicked. Add Keyboard Shortcuts option that shows a dialog with available shortcuts.
